title: Goku SS1 Star Platinum (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces SP and SPTW skin3 with Super Saiyan 1 Goku (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces SP and SPTW skin3 with SS1 Goku

Might make an audio pack for Goku Star Platinum
